T

tableBox - Variable in class client.view.ApprovalQueueController
Container the request rows are rendered into.
tableBox - Variable in class client.view.NotificationCenterController
Container the notification rows are rendered into.
tableBox - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController
Container the reservation rows are rendered into.
tableBox - Variable in class client.view.WaitlistController
Container the waiting-list rows are rendered into.
text(TextField) - Static method in class client.view.GateController
Trimmed text of a field, never null.
tick() - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Recomputes each offered row's time-left, flipping to "expired" at zero.
TickTarget(LocalDateTime, Label, Button) - Constructor for class client.view.WaitlistController.TickTarget
Creates a countdown target.
tickTargets - Variable in class client.view.WaitlistController
Offered rows whose countdown the timeline updates each second.
timeCheck - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Toggle for whether a specific time is set.
timeEnabledCheck - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Toggle for whether a specific visit time is set.
timestamp - Variable in class common.dto.ServerEvent
Server-side wall-clock time (epoch millis) when the event was constructed.
title - Variable in record class client.app.Navigator.Screen
The field for the title record component.
title() - Method in record class client.app.Navigator.Screen
Returns the value of the title record component.
toDate - Variable in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Echo of the inclusive range end, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
toDate - Variable in class common.dto.VisitsReportDTO
Echo of the inclusive range end, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
topbarSubtitle - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Topbar subtitle for the active screen.
topbarTitle - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Topbar title for the active screen.
toPicker - Variable in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Range end date picker.
toPicker - Variable in class client.view.VisitsReportController
Range end date picker.

Returns a string representation of this record class.

Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in record class client.view.ReservationCreateController.ParkOption
Returns a string representation of this record class.

Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in record class client.view.VisitsReportController.ParkOption
Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in record class common.dto.SubscriptionKey
Returns a string representation of this record class.
totalCancelled - Variable in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Total reservations cancelled across the whole range.
totalNoShow - Variable in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Total reservations marked no-show across the whole range.
TS - Static variable in class client.view.WaitlistController
Parses the DB DATETIME strings the server sends (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss).
type - Variable in class common.dto.ClientRequest
What the client is asking the server to do.
typeCombo - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Visit-type dropdown (INDIVIDUAL/FAMILY/GROUP).
